unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
network: Cannot reach the server. Check your network connection.
timeout: Server took too long to respond. Please try again.
AUTH_003: Account is locked or not activated.
AUTH_004: Password reset token is invalid or expired.
AUTH_006: Invalid login device or account temporarily locked.
AUTH_007: Session expired or email/device already used.
AUTH_008: Phone number is already in use.
AUTH_401: You are not authorized. Please sign in.
LINK_FAILED: Verification information does not match or profile is not linkable.
PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
CONFLICT: Data already exists, cannot create duplicate.
FILE_TOO_LARGE: Uploaded file exceeds the allowed size limit.
INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Internal server error. Please try again later.
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You are doing this too often. Please wait and try again.
EDIT_LOCKED: Record is being edited by another user.
http_401: Session expired. Please sign in again.
http_403: You do not have access to this resource.
http_429: Too many requests. Please try again later.
http_500: Internal server error. Please try again later.
http_503: Service paused. Please try again later.
